title: Timeline Calculation

posts.author: Ajay22 (Ajay Gill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All,

I am trying to calculate (in a group cell) the # of days between cells in adjacent columns. Both those columns are formatted as dates.

Question is what is the formula I should use and which format should that column type be?

Thanks in advance

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Ajay22,

Create a formula column and use this formula:

DAYS({Date 1}, {Date})

What if we could break free of the Formula column? and write formulas that update any type of columns? What if a formula could update multiple columns at once? This is possible with the Advanced Formula Booster app.
